description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is predominantly white with long, narrow vertical windows arranged in rows, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The front features a small porch area with steps leading up to the main entrance, which is set back under a covered section supported by columns. The house includes a paved driveway and a separate area with a basketball hoop, suggesting recreational use. The rear and side views reveal open balconies and a partially open upper floor, with visible interior spaces such as bedrooms and living areas. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, vertical strip windows, and a minimalist white exterior. Features include a front porch, paved driveway, and a basketball hoop area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, and a paved driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the basketball hoop area, and the open balcony on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large, open patio area and the back facade with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a row of vertical windows, the flat roof, and the supporting columns along the base.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, porch supported by columns, and a covered overhang.
